title: seriphidium serotinum
intro: Seriphidium serotinum, also known as wormwood, is a perennial shrub native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its bitter and aromatic properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to aid digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and nausea. The health benefits of Seriphidium serotinum include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce inflammation. Seriphidium serotinum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
